title: elymus dasystachys var. littoralis
intro: Elymus dasystachys var. littoralis, also known as littoral wheatgrass, is a variant of the Elymus dasystachys plant, a type of wild grass native to the coastal regions of East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elymus dasystachys var. littoralis include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and reduce inflammation in the body. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction, often used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
